declared_unit: One bearing unit which consists of one inner ring, one outer ring, rollers and a retainer, corresponding to 1.36 Kg.
note: This EPD reports modules as Upstream/Core/Downstream rather than EN 15804 A1-A3. The data quality table explicitly equates production (Upstream+Core) with 'A1-A3', so values shown here are the sum of Upstream+Core: Fossil 6.24+2.51=8.75; Biogenic -7.88E-02+(-7.49E-04)=-0.0795; Total 6.16+2.51=8.67 (note overall cradle-to-grave biogenic Total=0). No separate GWP-GHG indicator is given in the results table. Confidence low due to non-standard module naming and required summation/assumption.
